description: 50 classified documents exposing the machinery of conspiracy. Each page holds power proportional to its secrets—and its sins.

metadata_schema.content_type: enum: flight_log | autopsy | financial | phone_log | photo | email | memo | blueprint | dossier | transcript
metadata_schema.rarity: enum: common | uncommon | rare | epic | legendary
